# Go-Orca API

> Machine-readable API for CRM data, agent auth, quote submission, and MCP tool execution.

**Base URL:** https://go-orca.tech
**OpenAPI Spec:** https://go-orca.tech/openapi.json
**Auth Guide:** https://go-orca.tech/auth.md
**MCP Endpoint:** https://go-orca.tech/api/mcp (JSON-RPC 2.0, protocol 2024-11-05)
**MCP Registry:** https://smithery.ai/server/@go-orca/api-mcp

## Authentication

Three identity flows supported. See [auth.md](https://go-orca.tech/auth.md) for full flow.

- **Anonymous:** POST /api/agent/auth `{"identity_type":"anonymous"}` → returns API key immediately
- **Email (id-assertion):** POST /api/agent/auth `{"identity_type":"identity_assertion","assertion_type":"verified_email","assertion":"user@email.com"}` → email OTP claim flow
- **id-jag:** POST /api/agent/auth with JAG JWT assertion

All secured endpoints use `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>`.
On 401, response includes `WWW-Authenticate: Bearer resource_metadata="https://go-orca.tech/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource"`.

## Endpoints

### Agent Auth (no auth required)

- `POST /api/agent/auth` — Register and get credential
- `POST /api/agent/auth/claim` — Initiate email claim ceremony
- `POST /api/agent/auth/claim/complete` — Submit OTP, receive credential
- `POST /api/agent/auth/revoke` — Revoke credential

### CRM Leads (Bearer required)

- `GET /api/leads?status=new&limit=50` — List leads. Scopes: leads:read
- `PATCH /api/leads` body: `{id, status?, notes?}` — Update lead. Scopes: leads:write
- Valid statuses: new, contacted, qualified, converted, closed

### Public

- `POST /api/quote` body: `{name, email, company, description, team_size?, budget?, timeline?}` — Submit quote request

### MCP (JSON-RPC 2.0)

- `GET /api/mcp` — Server discovery (no handshake needed)
- `POST /api/mcp` — JSON-RPC 2.0 dispatcher
  - `initialize` — handshake
  - `tools/list` — enumerate tools
  - `tools/call` — run a tool

Available MCP tools: calculate_crm_roi, estimate_crm_cost, get_quote_url

## Rate Limits

- Per IP: 60 req/min
- Per credential: 120 req/min
- Registrations: 10/hr per IP
- Headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
- Exceeded: HTTP 429 with Retry-After header

## Error Format

All errors return JSON:
```json
{"error": "code", "message": "Human-readable description"}
```
Codes: unauthorized, invalid_token, missing_field, invalid_value, not_found, database_error
